## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs, fixtures, or release notes if the public contract changed.
- [ ] I verified the change in the authoritative monorepo copy.
- [ ] If this started as a standalone repo hotfix, I backported it to the monorepo or linked the backport work.

## Notes

`ex_vc` is developed in the private `delegate` monorepo and mirrored into the
public repository for releases and collaboration. Accepted changes are merged in
the monorepo first and then mirrored back out.
